name: severino-obsidian-commands
description: Severino Labs Obsidian plugin — in-editor command surface.
paras: Runtime commands invoked from Obsidian’s command palette; each carries a cordon effect (read < local_write < vault_write < remote_write < deploy) so the fleet sees its blast radius. Rendered from src/commands.mjs — the same array that registers the live commands.

commands.name: open-site-preview
commands.summary: Site preview: open pane — Open the site-accurate writeup preview pane.

commands.name: publish-gate
commands.summary: Publish gate: check this writeup — Run the MCP validate-writeup gate (draft mode).

commands.name: asset-doctor
commands.summary: Asset doctor: check images for orphans + missing — Report orphaned and missing writeup images.

commands.name: insert-figure
commands.summary: Insert figure block — Insert a ::figure DSL skeleton at the cursor.

commands.name: insert-table
commands.summary: Insert table block — Insert a ::table DSL skeleton at the cursor.

commands.name: insert-terminal
commands.summary: Insert terminal block — Insert a ::terminal DSL skeleton at the cursor.

commands.name: graphics-status
commands.summary: Graphics: status (unrendered sources) — List graphics sources vs rendered images.

commands.name: graphics-render
commands.summary: Graphics: render unrendered into images/ — Render graphics via brand/diagram into images/.

commands.name: sync-to-site
commands.summary: Sync writeups to the site repo — Run `site sync` (vault → site repo).

commands.name: schema-check
commands.summary: Schema: check this doc’s frontmatter — Lint frontmatter against the MCP schema.

commands.name: open-on-site
commands.summary: Open writeup on jseverino.com — Open the live writeup URL in the browser.

commands.name: copy-slug
commands.summary: Copy writeup slug — Copy the active writeup slug to the clipboard.

commands.name: new-task
commands.summary: New task — Create a task (title + project picker) via the MCP, then open it.

commands.name: open-cockpit
commands.summary: Cockpit: open — Open the fleet cockpit panel (backlog + stale debt, derived from the MCP).

commands.name: ask-the-vault
commands.summary: Ask the vault — Quick-switcher over the MCP find_runbook ranking; opens the hit.
